dimensio 0.3.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Function reference

Analysis

ca()
Correspondence Analysis
pca()
Principal Components Analysis
predict(<CA>) predict(<PCA>)
Predict New Coordinates

Resampling

bootstrap()
Partial Bootstrap Analysis

Visualization

biplot(<CA>) biplot(<PCA>)
Biplot
wrap_hull() stat_hull()
Wrap Observations
plot_contributions() plot_cos2()
Visualize Contributions and cos2
plot_rows() plot_columns() plot_individuals() plot_variables()
Visualize Factor Map
plot_variance()
Visualize Eigenvalues

Summary

summary(<CA>) summary(<PCA>)
Object Summaries

Getters and Setters

get_contributions() get_correlations() get_cos2()
Get Contributions
get_coordinates() get_replications()
Get Coordinates
get_data()
Get Original Data
get_distances()
Get Distances
get_eigenvalues() get_inertia() get_variance()
Get Eigenvalues
dim(<MultivariateAnalysis>) rownames(<MultivariateAnalysis>) colnames(<MultivariateAnalysis>) dimnames(<MultivariateAnalysis>) loadings(<PCA>)
Get Results
`[[`(<CA>,<ANY>,<missing>) `[[`(<PCA>,<ANY>,<missing>)
Extract Parts of an Object

Tidy Methods

tidy() augment()
Tidy Coordinates

Classes

CA-class .CA BootstrapCA-class .BootstrapCA
CA Results
MultivariateAnalysis .MultivariateAnalysis MultivariateAnalysis-class
Output of Multivariate Data Analysis
MultivariateBootstrap .MultivariateBootstrap MultivariateBootstrap-class
Output of Bootstrap Replications
MultivariateResults .MultivariateResults MultivariateResults-class
Multivariate Data Analysis Results
MultivariateSummary .MultivariateSummary MultivariateSummary-class SummaryCA-class .SummaryCA SummaryPCA-class .SummaryPCA
Summary of Multivariate Data Analysis
PCA-class .PCA BootstrapPCA-class .BootstrapPCA
PCA Results

Datasets

benthos
Benthos
colours
Colours
countries
Countries

On this page

dimensio is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.6.9000.
